title: Informal food traders workshop with expert speakers
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route District...
bodyHtml: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route District Municipality is hostING an Informal Food Traders Workshop in collaboration with George Municipality on Monday 25 November from 09:00 until 11:00 at the Thembalethu Thusong Centre in Thembalethu, George.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route District Municipality is hostING an Informal Food Traders Workshop in collaboration with George Municipality on Monday 25 November from 09:00 until 11:00 at the Thembalethu Thusong Centre in Thembalethu, George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This educational session is designed to empower individuals who own, operate, or work in informal food premises.","html":"This educational session is designed to empower individuals who own, operate, or work in informal food premises."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The workshop will provide essential information on the legal requirements for running a spaza shop."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Along with insights from expert speakers on key topics such as:","html":"Along with insights from expert speakers on key topics such as:"},{"type":"list","items":["Health & Hygiene;","Fire Safety;","Building Plan Compliance;","Waste Management;","Other important aspects related to operating informal food businesses."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information about the event, please contact Jessica Erasmus on 044 803 1522 or WhatsApp 081 346 3118.","html":"For more information about the event, please contact Jessica Erasmus on 044 803 1522 or WhatsApp 081 346 3118."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Informal food traders workshop with expert speakers
